description: معلومات الذاكرة والتخزين: RAM والقرص C:
command_preview: $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $totalRAM = [math]::Round($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB, 2); $freeRAM = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB, 2); $usedRAM = [math]::Round($totalRAM - $freeRAM, 2); $disk = Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter "DeviceID='C:'"; $totalDisk = [math]::Round($disk.Size/1GB, 2); $freeDisk = [math]::Round($disk.FreeSpace/1GB, 2); $usedDisk = [math]::Round($totalDisk - $freeDisk, 2); Write-Output "=== Memory & Storage ==="; Write-Output "RAM Total:
output:
=== Memory & Storage ===
RAM Total: 3.89 GB
RAM Used: 2.49 GB
RAM Free: 1.4 GB
RAM Usage: 64%
---
Disk C: Total: 59 GB
Disk C: Used: 48.81 GB
Disk C: Free: 10.19 GB
Disk C: Usage: 82.7%
